title: Add VS Code integration tests
description: packages/vscode/tests/ is empty. Add integration tests using @vscode/test-electron covering: diagnostics rendering, command execution, diagram panel opening, completion behavior, and transcript import flow.
close_reason: Merged via PR #23 -- 15 unit tests + 7 integration tests for fregma-vscode

title: Extend population validation to Phase 2 constraints (subset, ring, exclusion, equality)
Implement population instances for constraint validation
description: Add Population and PopulationInstance models to support sample data instances that validate constraints. Specified in ARCHITECTURE.md Sections 3.1.1 and 3.2 as a Phase 2 deliverable.

title: Integration exports (dbt, CI/CD validator, MCP server)
description: Build downstream integration points: dbt model export, CI/CD validation CLI, and MCP server for external tool access. These are separate projects that consume @fregma/core.

title: Implement NORMA XML import
description: Add NormaXmlImporter to support importing legacy NORMA .orm files. Requires NormaXmlParser, NormaToOrmMapper, and integration tests with sample NORMA files.

title: Implement objectified fact types
description: Add ObjectifiedFactType to the metamodel. Objectified fact types (nested fact types) are fact types reified as entity types so they can participate in other relationships. Specified in ARCHITECTURE.md Section 3.1.1. Requires changes across model, serialization, validation, verbalization, diagram, and schema.
close_reason: Merged via PR #22 -- objectified fact types implemented across all packages with 560 tests passing
